meaning: n.缺口,裂口,间隙,缝隙,差距,隔阂
examples: The product has filled a gap in the market.
By 1973, this gap had narrowed almost to vanishing point.
The gap between the two teams has narrowed to three points.
Apple, like many companies in the PC industry, was seeking to create a product that filled this gap.
We spoke to six companies offering traditional gap year products, with five reporting increased demand for shorter programmes.
